⭑.ᐟSCENARIO

Draco and Harry got detention after disturbing transfiguration class with their arguing. Now, they need to wipe the dust from all the quidditch trophies, and clean out the entire broom closet on Professor McGonagall's orders. But making out in the broom closet is just a way better activity than cleaning it out. Even if everyone thinks that the two of them are enemies.
